name: The Siam Commercial Bank Public Company Limited
summary: The Siam Commercial Bank Public Company Limited provides various financial products and services. It operates in four segments: Corporate, SME, Retail, and Insurance. The company offers deposit products, such as savings, current, fixed deposit, long term deposit, foreign currency, and E passbook deposit accounts; home, car, personal, and mortgage loans; debit, prepaid, and credit cards; investment products comprising mutual funds, debentures, bonds, and other investments; accident, savings, health expense, income protection, heritage and life protection, travel, motor, property, unit linked, and other insurance products; and various payment services. It also provides credit facilities, such as overdrafts, promissory notes, clean bill discounts, long term loans, letter of guarantee, standby letter of credit, and acceptance/Aval; financial advisory and merger acquisition services; fixed income instrument and underwriting services; structured and project finance services; and foreign exchange and interest rate risk management services. In addition, the company offers business collection, business payments, and bank accounts and liquidity management solutions; corporate trust services, including custody, mutual fund supervisor, registrar, escrow agent, security agent, and debenture holder's representative services; international trade remittance, fund transfer, and foreign exchange services; business solutions; and digital banking services. It provides its products and services through its head office and branch network in Thailand; and through its branches in Singapore, Hong Kong, Laos, Vietnam, China, and the Cayman Islands, as well as through its subsidiaries in Thailand, Singapore, Cambodia, and Myanmar. The Siam Commercial Bank Public Company Limited was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
